faqs.question: What documents are required to open a savings account?
faqs.answer: You need Government ID (Aadhar/PAN/Passport), Address Proof (utility bill/rental agreement), and PAN card for accounts > Rs10,000.

faqs.question: How long does it take to open a savings account?
faqs.answer: Savings account opening typically takes 1 business day. Current accounts may take 2-3 business days.

faqs.question: Are there any charges for opening a savings account?
faqs.answer: No, account opening is FREE. There's no annual maintenance fee and no minimum balance requirement.

faqs.question: What should I do if my card is lost?
faqs.answer: Report immediately via mobile app, website, or call 1-800-BANK-HELP. Your card will be blocked within 5 minutes. Replacement arrives in 5-7 days.

faqs.question: How do I check my credit card balance?
faqs.answer: Check via mobile app, internet banking, SMS 'BAL', or call customer service. Your outstanding balance is updated daily.

faqs.question: What is the interest-free period on credit cards?
faqs.answer: Basic cards offer 45-day interest-free period. Premium cards offer 60-day period. Interest is charged if full amount not paid by due date.

faqs.question: What is the minimum income required for a personal loan?
faqs.answer: Minimum annual income is Rs30,000. Salaried and self-employed individuals are eligible. Credit score of 650+ required.

faqs.question: How long does personal loan approval take?
faqs.answer: Pre-qualification takes 5 minutes. Full approval typically takes 24-48 hours after all documents are verified.

faqs.question: What is the maximum personal loan amount I can apply for?
faqs.answer: Maximum personal loan amount is Rs2,50,000. Actual approval depends on your income, credit score, and other financial obligations.

faqs.question: What is the interest rate on fixed deposits?
faqs.answer: Interest rates range from 4.5% to 7% p.a. depending on tenure (1 month to 10 years). Senior citizens get 0.5% higher rate.

faqs.question: Can I withdraw from a fixed deposit before maturity?
faqs.answer: Yes, premature withdrawal is allowed. 0.5% penalty is charged on interest earned if withdrawn before maturity.

faqs.question: Is my fixed deposit insured?
faqs.answer: Yes, all deposits are covered under DICGC insurance up to Rs10,00,000 per account per bank.

faqs.question: How long does a fund transfer take?
faqs.answer: NEFT: 30 minutes to 2 hours. RTGS: 5-30 minutes. IMPS: Instant. UPI: Instant. Processing time may vary based on receiving bank.

faqs.question: What is the maximum amount I can transfer via IMPS?
faqs.answer: Maximum IMPS transfer limit is Rs2,00,000 per transaction. Daily limit may be Rs5,00,000 depending on your account type.

faqs.question: Is there a charge for online fund transfers?
faqs.answer: No, online fund transfers (NEFT/RTGS/IMPS) are FREE. No charges levied on the sender or receiver.

faqs.question: How do I report a duplicate charge?
faqs.answer: Report within 7 days via mobile app, website, or customer service. Investigation completes in 10 business days. Full refund if confirmed as error.

faqs.question: What is the refund timeline for disputed transactions?
faqs.answer: Merchant refunds: 5-7 days. Duplicate charges: 10-14 days. Dispute resolution: 15-21 days after investigation.

faqs.question: Am I liable for unauthorized transactions?
faqs.answer: No liability if reported within 24 hours of transaction. After 24 hours, liability may apply depending on negligence.

faqs.question: How do I activate internet banking?
faqs.answer: Visit your nearest branch with ID and address proof, or apply via mobile app. Activation is instant for app-based registration.

faqs.question: Is internet banking secure?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use 256-bit SSL encryption, 2-factor authentication, and fraud monitoring. Always use secure password and trusted device.

faqs.question: How do I reset my internet banking password?
faqs.answer: Visit online banking login page > Forgot Password > Verify via registered email/mobile. New password sent via SMS/email.

faqs.question: How do I download the mobile banking app?
faqs.answer: Search 'BankName Mobile Banking' on Google Play Store or Apple App Store. Download, install, and login with your credentials.

faqs.question: What features are available in the mobile app?
faqs.answer: View balance, transfer funds, pay bills, invest, apply for loans, track spending, set budgets, and contact support 24/7.

faqs.question: What are the documents required for a business loan?
faqs.answer: Business registration, 2 years audited financials, 2 years IT returns, 6 months bank statements, GST registration (if applicable).

faqs.question: What is the interest rate for business loans?
faqs.answer: Business loan rates range from 9% to 14% p.a. based on credit profile, business performance, and loan amount.
